prompt_text:
***COUNTDOWN*** Your task is to construct a complex arithmetic expression to reach the target exactly. Inputs: [97, 7, 59, 17, 13, 19, 41]. Target: 27256. Rules: -Use standard operators (+, -, *, /). -Division must result in a whole number (no remainders or fractions allowed). -Each input number can be used once maximum. -Plan ahead: these targets require complex combinations of operations. -Think through the steps. The final line of your output must be: Solution: [your expression].

Provide your solution and an answer.
